description: Tracks all vendor contracts with pricing terms, renewal dates, and auto-renewal flags. n8n checks daily for contracts approaching expiry at 90/60/30-day thresholds and triggers alerts (Blueprint 5G). OpenClaw drafts renewal proposals at 60 days with recommended pricing adjustments.

fields.name: Contract ID
fields.description: Unique contract identifier.

fields.name: Contract Name
fields.description: Descriptive name for the contract.
fields.example: Sysco Foods - 2026 Annual Food Supply Agreement

fields.name: Vendor
fields.description: Link to the vendor in the Vendor Master table.

fields.name: Status
fields.description: Current contract lifecycle status.

fields.name: Contract Type
fields.description: Type of contract agreement.

fields.name: Category
fields.description: Product/service categories covered by this contract.

fields.name: Start Date
fields.description: Contract effective start date.

fields.name: End Date
fields.description: Contract expiration date. n8n monitors this for 90/60/30-day alerts.

fields.name: Auto Renewal
fields.description: Whether the contract auto-renews unless cancelled.

fields.name: Renewal Notice Days
fields.description: Number of days before expiry that cancellation/non-renewal notice must be given.

fields.name: Pricing Terms
fields.description: JSON object containing contracted pricing details by SKU. Cross-referenced by n8n for price verification on every PO line item (Blueprint 5B). Format: {"items": [{"sku": "CHK-BRS-001", "description": "Chicken Breast", "unit_price": 3.85, "uom": "lb", "min_qty": 50, "volume_discount": {"threshold": 200, "discount_pct": 5}}], "price_lock": true, "escalation_cap_pct": 3.0}

fields.name: Payment Terms
fields.description: Payment terms specified in this contract (overrides vendor default).

fields.name: Estimated Annual Value
fields.description: Estimated annual spend under this contract.

fields.name: Minimum Commitment
fields.description: Minimum purchase commitment amount for the contract period.

fields.name: Volume Rebate Terms
fields.description: Description of volume rebate or discount tiers, if any.

fields.name: Delivery Terms
fields.description: Contracted delivery schedule, lead times, and minimum order quantities.
fields.example: Delivery: Mon/Wed/Fri. Lead time: next-day for orders by 2PM. MOQ: $250.

fields.name: Contract Document
fields.description: Uploaded signed contract document (PDF).

fields.name: Approved By
fields.description: Name/role of the person who approved this contract (Controller or GM per Blueprint 5G).

fields.name: Approved Date
fields.description: Date the contract was approved.

fields.name: Renewal Proposal Sent
fields.description: Whether OpenClaw has generated and sent a renewal proposal at the 60-day mark.

fields.name: Renewal Notes
fields.description: Notes about renewal negotiations, proposed changes, or reasons for non-renewal.

fields.name: Days Until Expiry
fields.description: Calculated days remaining until contract expiry. Used by n8n for alert thresholds.

fields.name: Alert Tier
fields.description: Calculated alert tier based on days until expiry: 90-day, 60-day, 30-day, or Expired.

options.formula: IF({Days Until Expiry} <= 0, '🔴 Expired', IF({Days Until Expiry} <= 30, '🟠 30-Day Alert', IF({Days Until Expiry} <= 60, '🟡 60-Day Alert', IF({Days Until Expiry} <= 90, '🔵 90-Day Alert', '✅ Active'))))

fields.name: Related Purchase Orders
fields.description: Link to purchase orders placed under this contract.

fields.name: Created Date
fields.description: Date the contract record was created.

fields.name: Last Modified
fields.description: Date the contract record was last updated.

views.name: Expiring Soon
views.description: Contracts expiring within 90 days. Primary view for n8n daily expiry check workflow.
views.filter: Days Until Expiry <= 90 AND Status is Active

views.name: By Vendor
views.description: Grouped by vendor for easy review.
